steps.title: Identify key points on the line from the graph
steps.content: The line intersects the y-axis at $(0, 40)$ and the x-axis at $(60, 0)$. Any correct equation must satisfy both of these points.

steps.title: Test which equation satisfies both points
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B ($8x + 12y = 480$):
  • At $(0, 40)$: $8(0) + 12(40) = 480$ ✓
  • At $(60, 0)$: $8(60) + 12(0) = 480$ ✓
Both intercepts satisfy the equation. That matches choice B — B is correct.
